narrative:
Jefferson Township has 1,550 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
